# Feature Selection

**Summary**: The process of selecting a subset of relevant features from the original data to improve model performance and reduce dimensionality.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-alsahaf|Alsahaf, 2015]] applied feature selection algorithms (Functional Networks, Decision Trees, and Fuzzy Information Entropy) to refine input data for hybrid models.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Decision Trees (DT) provided the best improvement in prediction accuracy when paired with FFNN. ([[2015-alsahaf|Alsahaf, 2015, p. 74]])
